final:
// // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the register will not be loaded with data when enabled, which is contrary to the actual behavior.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input [15:0] d,
    output reg [15:0] q);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 16'b0;
        end else if (enable) begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the register will not be loaded with data when enabled, which is contrary to the actual behavior.
